title: Fix Admin Panel Access and Routing Issue

requirements.text: Fix the Admin panel routing so that navigating to the /admin path (or equivalent URL) correctly loads the AdminPanel page without redirecting away or showing an access-denied state for legitimate admin users. Ensure App.tsx correctly detects the 'admin' mode from the URL and renders the AdminPanel component.
acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to the /admin URL renders the Admin panel sidebar and dashboard without being redirected to the customer or technician view.
The admin role check in AdminPanel.tsx does not incorrectly block access when a user is authenticated via Internet Identity.
If the user is not yet authenticated, the admin panel shows a login prompt or redirects to Internet Identity login rather than a blank or broken screen.
After successful Internet Identity login on the admin URL, the admin dashboard is displayed with KPI cards and sidebar navigation.

requirements.text: Add a clearly visible direct link or button on the main landing page (or in the customer app header) to navigate to the Admin panel at the /admin route, so users can discover and access it without manually editing the URL.
acceptanceCriteria: A visible 'Admin Panel' link or button is present that navigates to the admin route.
The link is only shown to users with the Admin role, or is placed in a non-obtrusive location if role cannot be pre-checked.

requirements.text: Ensure the backend's role-based access control correctly identifies admin callers and that the frontend AdminPanel guard (which checks authentication and admin role) does not incorrectly reject valid admin principals. If no admin user exists in the backend, seed or allow the first registered user to be promoted to Admin role.
acceptanceCriteria: A user with Admin role can load the AdminPanel without being blocked by the role guard.
The backend exposes a way to assign or verify admin role for a given principal.
If no admin exists, the backend allows an initial admin bootstrap (e.g., first caller or a hardcoded principal is granted admin role).

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
Preserve all existing routing logic for the Customer and Technician app modes.
nonGoals: Redesigning the admin panel UI or adding new admin features.
Changing the authentication provider from Internet Identity.
Modifying the customer or technician frontend flows.
